units.description: Create the Item data model at src/items/model.py with fields id, user_id, status (enum), created_at.
Create Item CRUD routes at src/items/routes.py and register them on the app router at src/router.py.

Add a bulk-action endpoint to src/items/routes.py that groups items by status. SEEDED OVERLAP: touches_paths deliberately overlaps with unit_a2 to exercise compute_parallel_batch's overlap-matrix rejection (expected exclusion reason: 'path_overlap_with:unit_a2').
Create the User data model at src/users/model.py with fields id, email, display_name, created_at.

Create User CRUD routes at src/users/routes.py and register them on the app router at src/router.py. ALSO write seed data for the initial admin account to src/seeds/users.json. SEEDED SCOPE VIOLATION: touches_paths intentionally omits src/seeds/** so a faithful sub-agent's commit will produce a diff file outside declared scope, triggering merge_batch._scope_violations (expected conflict.category: 'scope_violation').
Create the User seed loader at src/users/seeds.py that reads seed data at app boot.
